metadata.campus: ENSAM - École Nationale Supérieure d'Arts et Métiers
metadata.coordinateSystem: Image pixel coordinates: [lng=px, lat=900-py] where px is pixels from left, py is pixels from top

properties.name: Complexe Sportif de l'Université Moulay Ismail
properties.description: Main university sports complex featuring indoor courts, athletics facilities, and multi-purpose sports halls for student and competitive events.

properties.name: Logements de Fonction
properties.description: On-campus residential accommodations for faculty, administrative staff, and visiting professors of the university.

properties.name: Laboratoires Forge et Fonderie
properties.description: Specialized forge and foundry laboratories equipped for metalworking, casting, heat treatment, and materials processing experiments.

properties.name: Département Matériaux et Procédés
properties.description: Department of Materials Science and Manufacturing Processes, covering metallurgy, polymers, composites, and production engineering.

properties.name: Amphi 450
properties.description: Large amphitheater with a seating capacity of 450 students, used for major academic lectures, conferences, and university events.

properties.name: Département Mathématiques, Informatique, Culture, Sciences de l'Homme et de la Société
properties.description: Interdisciplinary department covering mathematics, computer science, humanities, social sciences, and cultural studies.

properties.name: Département de Génie Industriel et Productique
properties.description: Department of Industrial Engineering and Production Systems, covering manufacturing processes, quality management, and lean production.

properties.name: Département Automatique, Electronique, Electrotechnique et Electromécanique
properties.description: Department covering automation, electronics, electrical engineering, and electromechanical systems including robotics and power systems.

properties.name: Centre de Langues
properties.description: Language center offering courses in Arabic, French, English, and other languages, supporting academic and professional communication skills.

properties.name: Département Energétique
properties.description: Department of Energy Engineering covering thermodynamics, renewable energy, fluid mechanics, and sustainable energy systems design.

properties.name: Laboratoires de Génie Civil
properties.description: Civil engineering laboratories equipped for structural testing, soil mechanics analysis, hydraulics experiments, and materials characterization.

properties.name: Buvette des Etudiants
properties.description: Student cafeteria and refreshment area offering snacks, beverages, and light meals for students and staff throughout the day.

properties.name: Département Génie Mécanique et Structures
properties.description: Department of Mechanical Engineering and Structural Analysis, covering machine design, solid mechanics, finite element analysis, and vibration.

properties.name: Bibliothèque
properties.description: University library providing access to academic books, scientific journals, digital databases, study spaces, and research resources.

properties.name: Centre de Recherche Scientifique et d'Innovation Technologique
properties.description: Scientific research and technological innovation center hosting interdisciplinary research projects, doctoral studies, and industry partnerships.

properties.name: Salles des Travaux Dirigés I
properties.description: Tutorial and directed study rooms - Block I, providing spaces for small-group academic sessions, workshops, and practical exercises.

properties.name: Salles des Travaux Dirigés II
properties.description: Tutorial and directed study rooms - Block II, additional spaces for practical academic sessions and student study groups.

properties.name: Atelier de Maintenance
properties.description: Maintenance workshop housing tools and equipment for campus facility upkeep, as well as practical training for engineering students.

properties.name: Amphi 250
properties.description: Amphitheater with a seating capacity of 250, used for academic lectures, departmental events, and student presentations.

properties.name: Administration I
properties.description: Main administrative building housing the director's office, student registration services, finance department, and principal administrative functions.

properties.name: Administration II
properties.description: Secondary administrative offices handling academic affairs, faculty management, scheduling, and departmental coordination.

properties.name: Forum
properties.description: Student forum and gathering space, used for information bulletins, student association activities, and campus social events.

properties.name: Mosquée
properties.description: Campus mosque providing a space for daily prayers and religious activities for Muslim students and staff.

properties.name: Salle de Conférence
properties.description: Conference hall equipped with modern presentation technology for academic seminars, colloquia, defense sessions, and international events.

properties.name: Terrain de Football
properties.description: Regulation football (soccer) field for student sports activities, university team training, and inter-university competitions.

properties.name: Terrain de Basket
properties.description: Basketball court for student recreational sports, team practice, and university competitions.

properties.name: Terrain de Mini-foot
properties.description: Small-sided football court for informal matches, recreational sports, and student fitness activities.

properties.name: Terrain de Volley
properties.description: Volleyball court for student sports activities, club practice sessions, and inter-department tournaments.

properties.name: Parking
properties.description: Main campus parking area providing parking spaces for students, academic staff, and visitors to the university.

properties.name: Entrée Principale
properties.description: Main campus entrance gate providing access to the university for students, staff, and visitors. Security checkpoint located here.
